prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large gray metal cube
  - obj_1: small green metal cube
  - obj_2: small cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: large yellow rubber sphere
  - obj_4: small green rubber sphere
  - obj_5: large blue rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: large green metal cylinder
  - obj_7: large brown metal cylinder
  - obj_8: small blue rubber cylinder
  - obj_9: small cyan metal cube

Questions:
[qrr_0341] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0342] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0343] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0344] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0345] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0346] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0347] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0348] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0349] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0350] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0351] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0352] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0353] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0354] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0355] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0356] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0357] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0358] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0359] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0360] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of all objects in the scene and answer distance comparison questions.

Let me identify the objects and their approximate positions:
- obj_0: large gray metal cube - front-right area
- obj_1: small green metal cube - front-center area
- obj_2: small cyan rubber cylinder - back-left area
- obj_3: large yellow rubber sphere - right area
- obj_4: small green rubber sphere - back area
- obj_5: large blue rubber cylinder - center-right area
- obj_6: large green metal cylinder - front-center area
- obj_7: large brown metal cylinder - front-center area
- obj_8: small blue rubber cylinder - back-left area
- obj_9: small cyan metal cube - left area

Now let me estimate distances for each question:

First, let me estimate obj_1 (green metal cube) to obj_7 (brown cylinder) distance. They're both in the front area, moderate distance apart. I'll estimate this as a medium distance.

[qrr_0341] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_3-obj_4: obj_3 (yellow sphere, right) to obj_4 (green sphere, back) - large distance. obj_1-obj_7 < obj_3-obj_4: >? Let me think... obj_3 is far right, obj_4 is back-left, quite far. obj_1-obj_7 seems moderate. I'll say obj_1-obj_7 < obj_3-obj_4, so "<"

[qrr_0342] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_3-obj_5: obj_3 (yellow, right) to obj_5 (blue cylinder, center-right) - small distance. obj_1-obj_7 > obj_3-obj_5, so ">"

[qrr_0343] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_3-obj_6: obj_3 to obj_6 (green cylinder, front) - moderate distance. Similar to obj_1-obj_7. "~="

[qrr_0344] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_3-obj_8: obj_3 (right) to obj_8 (back-left) - large distance. obj_1-obj_7 < obj_3-obj_8, so "<"

[qrr_0345] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_3-obj_9: obj_3 to obj_9 (cyan cube, left) - large distance. "<"

[qrr_0346] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_4-obj_6: obj_4 (back) to obj_6 (front) - large distance. "<"

[qrr_0347] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_4-obj_8: obj_4 and obj_8 are close together in back. "<" (obj_1-obj_7 > obj_4-obj_8), so ">"

[qrr_0348] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_4-obj_9: obj_4 (back) to obj_9 (left) - moderate to large. "~=" or "<"

[qrr_0349] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_5-obj_6: obj_5 to obj_6 - moderate. "~="

[qrr_0350] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_5-obj_8: obj_5 to obj_8 - moderate. "~="

[qrr_0351] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_5-obj_9: obj_5 to obj_9 - moderate-large. "<" or "~="

[qrr_0352] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_6-obj_8: obj_6 to obj_8 - large. "<"

[qrr_0353] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_6-obj_9: obj_6 to obj_9 - moderate. "~="

[qrr_0354] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_8-obj_9: obj_8 to obj_9 - moderate. "~="

For obj_1-obj_8 questions: obj_1 (front-center) to obj_8 (back-left) - large distance.

[qrr_0355] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_2-obj_3: obj_2 (back-left) to obj_3 (right) - very large. "<"

[qrr_0356] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_2-obj_4: obj_2 and obj_4 nearby. obj_1-obj_8 > obj_2-obj_4, ">"

[qrr_0357] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_2-obj_5: obj_2 to obj_5 - large. "~="

[qrr_0358] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_2-obj_6: obj_2 to obj_6 - large. "~="

[qrr_0359] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_2-obj_7: obj_2 to obj_7 - very large. "<"

[qrr_0360] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_2-obj_9: obj_2 and obj_9 are close. obj_1-obj_8 > obj_2-obj_9, ">"
